criteria.title: Minimum Annual Turnover
criteria.description: The bidder shall have a minimum average annual turnover of INR 5 Crore during the last three financial years (2022-23, 2023-24, 2024-25).

criteria.title: Completed Construction Projects
criteria.description: The bidder must have successfully completed at least three (3) similar construction projects of value not less than INR 1 Crore each in the last five financial years.

criteria.title: GST Registration
criteria.description: The bidder shall possess a valid Goods and Services Tax (GST) registration certificate. The GSTIN must be active as on the date of submission.

criteria.title: ISO 9001:2015 Certification
criteria.description: The bidder shall hold a valid ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System certification issued by an accredited certification body.

criteria.title: Paramilitary Infrastructure Experience
criteria.description: Preferably, the bidder may have prior experience with construction or maintenance of paramilitary or defence infrastructure.
